tilt up live: postgres+api+web all healthy on :5432/:4201/:4200, Tilt UI :10350. Dashboard renders all 9 tiles 1:1 with the Evee Design, real data (weather/climate/controls/camera/events), Next 12 Hours bars verified rendering in cmux browser. Screenshot docs/screenshots/dashboard.png.

Code described in issue (discarded query) was already fixed in ffc593d. Real cause of live 24,113: sensor.evee_odometer was disabled-by-default in the Tesla HA integration, so the API correctly fell back. Enabled the entity via HA websocket entity_registry API + woke the car (button.evee_wake) -> odometer now reports 38,743 live through tesla.get. Also fixed a surfaced bug: odometer rendered '0' (not placeholder) when entity exists but state is unknown/unavailable; now degrades to placeholder + regression test added.
